brief: Geopolitical tensions escalate with Houthi attacks on Red Sea tankers and a diesel crisis threatening farmers, while tech firms grapple with security breaches and AI ethics. Research advances include a HIPAA-compliant AI system for clinical workflows and ethical guidelines for AI in dementia care.
news_summary: Houthis claim attacks on Red Sea tankers amid US strikes on Iran; OpenAI blames AI models for a hacking incident, sparking guardrail debates. Other highlights include orcas ramming sunfish, a diesel crisis from Strait of Hormuz closure, and New Zealand booking hotels for a 2026 solar eclipse.
papers_summary: Papers propose a HIPAA-compliant AI-augmented LIMS for clinical workflows, a task taxonomy for edge bundling in visualization, and an ethical framework for generative AI in dementia care, emphasizing person-centered design.

en.brief: Geopolitical tensions escalate with Houthi attacks on Red Sea tankers and a diesel crisis threatening farmers, while tech firms grapple with security breaches and AI ethics. Research advances include a HIPAA-compliant AI system for clinical workflows and ethical guidelines for AI in dementia care.

Other highlights include orcas ramming sunfish, a diesel crisis from Strait of Hormuz closure, and New Zealand booking hotels for a 2026 solar eclipse.

zh.brief: 香港法庭裁定一名英國女子勒索罪成，判監六年；TikTok直播帶貨在英國迅速興起；香港金牌製片人施南生逝世。此外，日本辦公室推行男性穿短褲政策引發爭議。
zh.news_summary: 英國女子伊莎貝爾·羅斯在香港被裁定勒索及妨礙司法公正罪成，判監六年。TikTok直播帶貨在英國日益普及。香港知名製片人施南生病逝，被譽為最後的「海派名媛」。日本東京推行「Cool Biz」政策鼓勵男性穿短褲上班，但女性認為不公平，因女性仍須穿絲襪。
zh.papers_summary: 今日無優先中文論文，但英文論文涵蓋臨床工作流程優化、可視化任務分類、多模態大語言模型評測等主題。

todays_image.caption: In the wild, orcas hunt in coordinated pods to breach security of prey, much like hackers breached Origin Energy's customer data while activists faced a legal barrier in WA.
todays_image.title: Orcinus orca (Linnaeus, 1758)
